description: Create a professional hydraulic schematic for an excavator 'thumb' attachment using ISO 1219 standard symbols based on the specifications in '~/Desktop/work_order_5592.txt'. Use specific ISO symbols for the Variable Pump, Tank, 4/3 Directional Valve, Double-Acting Cylinder, and Filter. Use solid lines for main pressure and return lines, and dashed lines for valve pilot/drain lines. Include text labels as specified in the work order (e.g., 'P1', 'CV-1'). Save the source file to '~/Diagrams/excavator_thumb_circuit.drawio' and export the final diagram as a PDF to '~/Diagrams/excavator_thumb_circuit.pdf'.
